title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean (valued at $7 billion), shares his philosophy on building successful companies. He emphasizes that competitive advantage comes from focused execution and solving real problems teams face, rather than building larger models or having better pitches.
